title: The Police Station Suspect Lineup
completeDialogue: Outstanding work, Rookie! You built a robust functional framework backed by customized try-catch blocks to safely evaluate and accuse the culprit.
completeHint: The suspect verification script ran flawlessly with zero terminal crashes.

phases.dialogue: To bring dynamic items into a scene, we call our classic search command on the data folder we need. Let's locate the main folder containing our records. Type this command to grab the profiles: self.search(suspectFiles)
phases.lesson: Unquoted identifiers pass complex object states or directories into file search parameters.

active_hotspots.hover_text: The main terminal database is offline.

phases.dialogue: We're almost done! Instead of writing heavy checks, we can dynamically insert our suspect right into a text string using the special form ${variableName} inside backticks. Let's make our official declaration to log the suspect to the system.
phases.output:
Evaluating entries... Contradictions: 0 (Perfect Match!)
📢 LOG: I accuse suspect3
phases.lesson: Template literal blocks declared with backticks process embedded expressions dynamically via standard syntactic formatting notation ${}.
